ab: Asenay, i loma’ay kiso haw?
en: Asenay, are you home?

ab: Hai, kapicomod.
en: Yes, come on in.

ab: Asenay, i loma’ay kiso haw?
en: Asenay, are you home?

ab: ci Omos kako, awaay i loma’ ci Asenay, wa mimaan saw? ano minokay to ci Asenay i, pasowal han to ako cingra.
ch: B:Asenay不在家耶!我是Omos，有什麼事嗎? 回來我會轉告Asenay。
en: Asenay is not at home. I am Omos. What can I do for you? I will let him know when he comes back.

ab: cima kamo?
en: Who are you?

ab: mamo, ci Afas aci Asenay kami, patadoen ho kami a mifawah!
ch: B:奶奶，我們是Afas和Asenay，幫我們開門!
en: Grandma, we are Afas and Asenay, please open the door for us.

ab: cima saw?
en: Who is it?

ab: ci Fuya kako, o mamikilim kako ci Ofayan.
en: I am Fuya, I am here for Ofay.

ab: mamo, tayniay kako a miliso’ i tisowanan.
en: Grandma, I am here to see you.

ab: halafinay to kiso a ca katayni, ma’ilolay to kako i tisowanan.
ch: A:你好久沒來了，我好想念你。
en: You haven’t been here for a long time. I missed you so much.

ab: Asenay, kilimen to ako kiso a misalama.
en: Asenay, I am here to play with you.

ab: kapicomod to, halafinay to ko pitatala ako i tisowanan.
en: Come on in! I have been waiting for you for a long time.

ab: o nipasinikan no mako koni a konga, tanamen a komaen makena!
ch: A:這是我種的地瓜，吃吃看!
en: This is the sweet potato I grow. Try it!

ab: ko^sanay koni a konga.
en: The sweet potato is so sweet.

ab: katayni! o nipalomaan no mako a losay koni, tanamen a komaen.
ch: A:過來!這是我種的水果，吃看看。
en: Come here! These are the fruits I grow. You should try it.

ab: tadako^sanay to koni a losay.
en: The fruit tastes sweet.

ab: kamaro’! tanamen a komaen koni nipalomaan ako a ariray!
ch: A:請坐! 這是我種的有機玉米吃看看!
en: Take a seat! You should try some organic corn that I grow.

ab: waw! tadako^sanay to koni a ariray.
en: Wow! The corn tastes so sweet.

ab: komaen kiso to mami’ han?
en: Do you want some oranges?

ab: cowa kanga’ay kako a komaen to mami’, o lingko to ko kaenen no mako.
ch: B:我不能吃橘子，我吃蘋果就好。
en: I can’t eat oranges. I will have some apples instead.

ab: komaen kiso to ’asiro han?
en: Do you want some oranges?

ab: cowa kanga’ay kako a komaen to ’asiro, o lingko to ko kaenen no mako.
ch: B:我不能吃橘子，我吃蘋果就好。
en: I can’t eat oranges. I will have some apples instead.

ab: komaen kiso to ^pang haw?
en: Would you want some cookies?

ab: Hai, maolahay kako.
en: Sure, I like it very much.

ab: kelacen ako ko losay a pakaen i tisowanan.
en: Let me peel the fruit for you.

ab: Aray, makasalangay to koni a losay.
en: Thank you. This fruit is so juicy.

ab: alaen ako ko nanom a pananom i tisowanan.
en: I will bring you some water.

ab: Aray.
en: Thank you.

ab: halikaenen, adihayay ko mitangtangan ako a dateng.
en: Enjoy yourself. I cooked a lot of dishes.

ab: waw! tada fangsisay a kaenen.
ch: B:嗚! 真的很香也好吃。
en: Oh! It smells good and looks delicious.

ab: halikaenen, adihayay ho ko kakaenen itini.
en: Enjoy yourself. There is a lot more.

ab: ano hatira i, cowa to kangodo kako a komaen yo!
en: I’ll make myself at home then.

ab: halikaenen, adihayay ho ko kakaenen itini.
en: Enjoy yourself.There is a lot more.

ab: adihayay to ko mikaenan no mako, cowa to kanga’ay a komaen.
ch: B:我吃了好多，不能再吃了。
en: I ate a lot and couldn’t eat any more.
